• A C++ rant meme generator with live text replacement
  • Uses URL parameter to pre-fill text content
  • Styled with a clean, readable layout
    const inputField = document.getElementById('userInput');
    const targets = document.querySelectorAll('.replace');

This web application creates a customizable version of Linus Torvalds' famous C++ rant. Users can enter their own text in the input field, which dynamically replaces all instances of "C++" throughout the rant. The application also supports URL parameters for pre-filling the text, making it easy to share customized versions of the meme.
